name: Spinach-Parmesan Balls
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Packages frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed dry
1/2 cup (1 stick) butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
Makes about 40 balls
Season with salt and freshly ground pepper
Preheat oven to 325°F. Combine the first six ingredients in a medium bowl.
Form into 2-inch balls and place on a baking sheet. Bake until just brown, about 45 minutes. Serve immediately.
